form.formComment: Fast starter. Last start finished 5th on April 12 over 320m at this track behind Golden Blend beaten 6 lengths (18.62) in a Grade 5. Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Fast starter. Last start finished 5th on April 12 over 320m at this track behind Golden Blend beaten 6 lengths (18.62) in a Grade 5. Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (18.87) in a Grade 5, finishing a 10 length seventh. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and six places from nine starts. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (18.71) in a Grade 5, finishing a 9 length fifth. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Expected to be in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the home straight.

form.formComment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when second (18.36) at big odds over 320m at this track. Drawn awkwardly. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (19.17) in a Grade 5, finishing a 8 length seventh. Has one success and four minors from eight starts from box 5. Can feature in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after box rise put in some awkward strides and lost momentum.
Came together midway through the turn to the back straight, losing momentum.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing last on April 13 over 365m at Nowra in a Grade 5. Prefer in something easier.

form.formComment: Showed good improvement when second behind Rogue Agent at this track last start over 320m (18.57). Has good early speed and will stick on.

form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 3 lengths over 320m at this track in a handy 18.08, beating Aussie Lantern. Excellent record from this draw, including two wins. Go well.

formComments.comment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 3 lengths over 320m at this track in a handy 18.08, beating Aussie Lantern. Excellent record from this draw, including two wins. Go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was tightened for room entering the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in his races. The latest effort was a 9 length eighth over 320m at this track. Not up to this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At first turn wanted to shift up track and collided.
Checked off heels at first corner.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at her last couple of starts, most recently at Richmond Straight over 324m. Not keen, needs to lift.
